title: Random Item Speedrun
description: A minecraft mod to speedrun random minecraft item.
body:
# Random Speedrun

A Minecraft Fabric mod that picks a random item and tracks how long it takes you to find it. Built for speedrun-style challenges.

## Features

### Item Roulette
- Use the `/ritem` command to pick a random item
- A roulette animation shows the target item on screen
- When you find the item in your inventory, the timer stops and a celebration effect plays

### Timer
- The timer starts when the roulette finishes
- When you find the target item, the timer freezes and a "CONGRATULATIONS!" message appears

### Death Penalty Modes (Optional)
9 death types that trigger when you find the target item:

| Death Type | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| `creeper` | Exploding creeper spawns behind you |
| `lightning` | Lightning strike |
| `anvil` | Falling anvil from above |
| `arrow_rain` | Arrows rain from the sky |
| `explosion` | Large explosion |
| `mob_army` | Army of zombies and skeletons |
| `meteor` | Fireball from above |
| `assassin` | Vindicator attacks from behind |
| `dream_boat` | Boat with Dream NPC drops from the sky |

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/ritem` | Start roulette with random item |
| `/ritem <item>` | Start roulette with specific item |
| `/ritem <item> <death_type>` | Specific item + death penalty |
| `/ritem death <death_type>` | Random item + specific death penalty |

## License

MIT
